description: Gamma 200 OK test. Changed HTTP status from 400 Bad Request to 200 OK in gamma_sse template. Previous issue: frontend silently failed on 400 status without showing error to user.

test_messages.expected_behavior: error message or warning should appear instead of silent failure

check_items: Is the block response delivered (etap log blocked=1)?
Does the UI show the content_policy error message?
Does generation silently fail without any indication?
